heading: The Oasis RV Resort
body:
The Oasis is a Private RV Resort on Lakeshore Drive in Osoyoos fronting Osoyoos lake. Each lot is privately owned. The Resort is a shared interest and not a strata consisting of 104 lots fully serviced with electricity, sewer and water and cable/internet (if you wish to purchase these services). Lot 105 is the manager's residence & office and a lounge for co-owners.

We have a private beach across the road and within the grounds we have an outdoor pool, fitness building with hot tub, main washroom with showers and a laundry facility. We have a club house with kitchen, couches, TV, and games. There is a garage which houses all the tools for the on-site management to maintain the common property. We have a boat storage lot that has 15 spots and a number of RV storage spots available.
